scripts.dev: concurrently --names "client,admin" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev -w apps/client" "npm run dev -w apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/client && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w apps/client && npm run type-check -w apps/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/client && npm run lint -w apps/admin
